description: Seed golden test for Closing Statement

CLOSING STATEMENT
Statement Date: 2026-09-30
Property: 8200 West Park Avenue, Denver, CO 80221
Buyer: Harborview Capital Partners LLC
Seller: Maple Ridge Office Owner LP
Settlement Agent: Front Range Title Company
Closing Date: 2026-09-30
Purchase Price: $18,750,000
Loan Amount: $12,500,000
Buyer Cash to Close: $6,925,430.22
Seller Net Proceeds: $17,904,112.80
Prorations: county taxes credit to buyer $38,450.18; September rent credit to seller $72,000.00; CAM reconciliation debit to seller $14,200.00
Title/Settlement Charges: owner's title policy $42,500; escrow fee $8,750; recording fees $1,240; transfer tax $187,500
Payoffs: First Western Bank loan payoff $612,480.22; mechanic lien release $22,000
Recording Reference: Reception No. 20260930008912
